title: Create a Windows HostProcess Pod — Base Image for HostProcess Containers
text:
HostProcess containers can be built from any of the existing
Windows Container base images
.
Additionally a new base mage has been created just for HostProcess containers!
For more information please check out the
windows-host-process-containers-base-image github project
.

HostProcess containers fail to start with
failed to create user process token: failed to logon user: Access is denied.: unknown
Ensure containerd is running as
LocalSystem
or
LocalService
service accounts. User accounts (even Administrator accounts) do not have permissions to create logon tokens for any of the supported
user accounts
.
